series.title: Contract Bride
series.tagline: She signed for money. She stayed for revenge.

scenes.caption: She wasn't supposed to fight back.
She's back. And she's not asking permission.
scenes.narration: The mansion doors swing open, and she walks in like she owns everything—including my husband's past.

scenes.caption: He turns pale. Who is she to him?
scenes.narration: Elena, my ice-cold billionaire husband, freezes at the sight of her. In two years, I've never seen him afraid.

scenes.caption: I'm the wife. So why do I feel like the intruder?
scenes.narration: I stand in my simple silk gown, invisible, as the woman glides toward him. 'Adrian, darling, did you miss me?'

scenes.caption: The woman who broke him first.
scenes.narration: 'Vivian,' Adrian whispers, his voice cracking. The name he swore he'd buried. His first love. The one who left him at the altar.

scenes.caption: She knows about the contract.
scenes.narration: Vivian's eyes slice toward me. 'So this is the little charity case you married for the company?' She laughs. 'How much did he pay you, sweetheart?'

scenes.caption: Someone betrayed me.
scenes.narration: My blood runs cold. Only three people knew the truth of our marriage. How does she know?

scenes.caption: She came armed with paper.
scenes.narration: Adrian steps between us, jaw tight. 'Vivian, you have no right to be here.' But she smiles, pulling a folded document from her purse.

scenes.caption: Still married... to her?!
scenes.narration: She unfolds it slowly. 'Actually, darling—I have every right. Because legally, I'm still your wife.' The room spins as Adrian's face shatters.

scenes.caption: The world is watching us tonight.
scenes.narration: The paparazzi swarm the charity gala, and the contract demands one thing: proof of love.

scenes.caption: Smile. Convince them we're in love.
scenes.narration: Damian pulls her close, his whisper as sharp as ice. Smile, wife. Convince them.

scenes.caption: Just a kiss for the cameras.
scenes.narration: His lips meet hers for the cameras — but her heart betrays the lie, racing against her will.

scenes.caption: His ex-lover won't let go.
scenes.narration: Across the room, Vivienne watches, her painted smile twisting into a blade of jealousy.

scenes.caption: That wasn't part of the deal.
scenes.narration: When they part, Elena sees it in his eyes — something real flickering beneath the ice.

scenes.caption: I can't forget why I'm here.
scenes.narration: But revenge is a promise she made in blood, and love was never on her list.

scenes.caption: I know what you really are.
scenes.narration: Vivienne approaches with a poisoned toast and a secret that could shatter everything.

scenes.caption: He's planning to destroy you.
scenes.narration: Then Vivienne leans in and whispers the truth — Damian signed a second contract, one that ends with Elena gone.

scenes.caption: A secret hidden for years...
scenes.narration: The old mansion smells of dust and secrets. Elena clutches a yellowed envelope she found hidden behind the library shelf.

scenes.caption: The hidden will changes everything.
scenes.narration: Inside is a will — signed by his late father, dated one day before his mysterious death. Her hands tremble.

scenes.caption: An heir the family buried.
scenes.narration: The words burn into her: everything belongs not to Adrian — but to a child no one has ever spoken of.

scenes.caption: He wasn't supposed to see this.
scenes.narration: Footsteps echo. Adrian enters, his cold gray eyes locking onto the paper in her grasp.

scenes.caption: 'You don't know what you've done.'
scenes.narration: 'Where did you find that?' His voice is ice, but his hands shake with something like fear.

scenes.caption: She came for money. She stays for war.
scenes.narration: Elena pulls away, heart pounding. This is the weapon she needs — the revenge she signed up for.

scenes.caption: The one person nobody expected.
scenes.narration: Then a voice from the doorway freezes them both. 'That will is fake — and I can prove it.'

scenes.caption: Her secret is about to shatter everything...
scenes.narration: Elena's blood runs cold — the woman is Adrian's presumed-dead mother. And she knows Elena's real name.
